[114:35]Well, there were really like two specific things.

[114:43]I'm a race realist.

[114:47]I believe that America is a white country.

[114:58]have done it.

[115:00]I believe that everything about America, its architecture, its constitution, its political

[115:06]and social culture, all of it, it proceeds from the European character.
